videoJson.name: 1/4" Akai
videoJson.fact1:
This format was initially only
available in black-and-white, 
with color being introduced in 
1974; color tapes were not 
backwards-compatible due to 
the systems running at 
different speeds
videoJson.fact2: This format was marketed for consumer use, intended  for use in home movies
videoJson.fact3: This format was typically  stored on 5" reels  but larger 10.5" reels  were later introduced
